name: ds-bench
description: Static audit for design-system agent readiness.
author: Jason Wright

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/audit/checks dist/src/audit/checks && cp src/audit/checks/guidance-confusable-pairs.json dist/audit/checks/guidance-confusable-pairs.json && cp src/audit/checks/guidance-confusable-pairs.json dist/src/audit/checks/guidance-confusable-pairs.json
